provenance.source: Hand-authored for toolcall-repair-bench; models the json_with_prose failure shape common to small local models.

raw_output: Sure, deleting that now: {"name": "delete_file", "arguments": {"path": "/tmp/old_cache.bin"}} Let me know if you need anything else.
note: A valid delete_file JSON call is embedded between prose on both sides; discarding the surrounding sentences leaves the single tool call with path taken verbatim.
